# altype – Albanian Typing Test

A Next.js typing speed test app built for the Albanian language.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 15 (App Router, Turbopack)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS

## Key Files
- `src/components/TypingTest.tsx` – main typing test component with WPM, accuracy, timer logic
- `src/data/albanianTexts.ts` – Albanian text passages (easy / medium / hard)
- `src/app/page.tsx` – root page

## Development
```bash
npm run dev
```
Open http://localhost:3000
